## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changed and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix — incorrect code, broken example, typo, outdated API name
- [ ] Update — guidance improved or expanded (no new file)
- [ ] New guide — new document added to `docs/`
- [ ] New skill — agent skill added or updated in `docs/skills.md`
- [ ] Repository — README, CONTRIBUTING, templates

## Checklist

### Content quality
- [ ] Every code example uses a fenced code block with a language tag (` ```tsx `, ` ```ts `, etc.)
- [ ] No escaped characters from copy-paste (`\<`, `\_`, `\*`, `\=\>`)
- [ ] No base64 images — diagrams use Mermaid
- [ ] No inline citation numbers in prose (move references to a `## References` section)
- [ ] Code snippets work against current Next.js stable
- [ ] Version-specific behavior (14 vs 15, etc.) is called out explicitly where relevant

### Line count
- [ ] Every modified or added document is under 1,000 lines
- [ ] Run: `wc -l docs/*.md` to verify

### Structure
- [ ] New documents added to the table in `README.md`
- [ ] New agent skills include a YAML frontmatter `description` field with clear trigger language
